verdict: An exceptionally rhythmic and well-paced chart with comfortable flow, slightly marred by a couple of physical 3-panel overlap conflicts during holds.

issues.problem: JUMP LR occurs while HOLD D is active (ends at 93.916), creating an illegal 3-panel conflict that requires a hand or bracket tap.
JUMP LR occurs while HOLD U is active (ends at 96.810), forcing an awkward 3-panel hand/bracket interaction.
